original_image_tags: The page appears to be the back cover of a manila folder or envelope. It is aged, with two black binder holes at the top and a large brown stain or torn paper remnant adhered diagonally in the center-left. Faint, illegible vertical text is visible through the paper at the top. The bottom contains two stamped ink markings.

elements.description: Multiple ink stamps and a dark diagonal tape mark on aged paper. One stamp reads 'RECEIVED ATOMIC ENERGY LIAISON SECTION APR 26 2 05 PM '49 F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Another reads 'RECEIVED -- FLETCHER MAY 26 7 41 PM '49'.
